title: Danh động từ & Nguyên mẫu (1) — Động từ nguyên mẫu
topic: Danh động từ & Nguyên mẫu (Gerund & Infinitive)
summary: To-infinitive, bare infinitive: chức năng, vị trí, các động từ đi kèm, lưu ý bị động.

sections.heading: I. Giới thiệu chung về Động từ nguyên mẫu (Infinitive)
sections.body:
Động từ nguyên mẫu (Infinitive) có hai dạng chính:

**1. Động từ nguyên mẫu có TO (To Infinitive Verb):**
- To V: to make
- To be V-ing (tiếp diễn): to be making
- To have Vpp (hoàn thành): to have made
- To have been V-ing (hoàn thành tiếp diễn): to have been making
- To be Vpp (bị động): to be made
- To have been Vpp (bị động hoàn thành): to have been made

**2. Động từ nguyên mẫu không có TO (Base/Bare Verb):**
- Chỉ có động từ, không có TO (Base verb - Bare verb).
- V: watch
- have Vpp (hoàn thành): have watched
- be Vpp (bị động): be watched

sections.heading: II. Chức năng của Động từ nguyên mẫu có TO (To-Infinitive)
sections.body:
**1. Làm chủ ngữ (Subject):**
- Ví dụ: 'To become a teacher is my dream.'
- Ví dụ: 'To cook my dinner is what I have to do now.'
- Ví dụ: 'To me, to have made the same mistake twice is unforgivable.'

**2. Làm vị ngữ (Predicate):**
- Ví dụ: 'My dream is to become a teacher.'
- Ví dụ: 'What I have to do now is to cook my dinner.'

**3. Theo sau tân ngữ (V + O + To V):**
- Ví dụ: 'He told me to give this to you.'
- Ví dụ: 'The doctor advised John to take a rest every two hours.'
- Ví dụ: 'The teacher encouraged her students to try their best in the final exam.'
- Động từ tương tự (V + sb + to V): Assume (cho rằng), Beg (cầu xin), Believe (tin), Cause (gây ra), Challenge (thách thức), Command (yêu cầu), Compel (bắt buộc), Consider (xem xét), Enable (cho phép), Expect (hi vọng), Forbid (cấm), Force (bắt), Help (giúp đỡ), Instruct (hướng dẫn), Invite (mời), Order (yêu cầu), Permit (cho phép), Persuade (thuyết phục), Remind (nhắc nhở), Request (yêu cầu), Teach (dạy), Tell (bảo), Urge (giục), Want (muốn), Warn (cảnh báo), Wish (ước).

**4. Theo sau một số động từ nhất định (V + To V):**
- Ví dụ: 'We decided to have a baby.'
- Ví dụ: 'They plan to go abroad next year.'
- Ví dụ: 'I would like to travel alone to Japan.'
- Động từ thường gặp: Afford, Agree, Aim, Arrange, Appear, Ask, Attempt, Care, Choose, Claim, Decide, Deserve, Fail, Happen, Hesitate, Offer, Plan, Prepare, Pretend, Promise, Propose, Refuse, Seem, Swear, Tend, Threaten, Volunteer, Vow, Want, Wish, Hope, Intend, Learn, Manage, Need, Neglect, Would hate, Would like, Would love, Would prefer, Yearn, Urge.

sections.heading: III. Chức năng của Động từ nguyên mẫu không TO (Bare Infinitive)
sections.body:
**1. Theo sau trợ động từ (Auxiliary verbs):**
- Trợ động từ thường: do, does, did. Ví dụ: 'He did love her, but not anymore.' / 'She doesn’t live here.'
- Trợ động từ khuyết thiếu: Can, Could, May, Might, Must, Shall, Ought to, Should, Will, Would, Need, Dare, Have to, Used to. Ví dụ: 'We have to go now.' / 'You shouldn’t make that mistake again.'

**2. Theo sau tân ngữ (V + O + V_bare):**
- Let (cho phép): 'My mother lets me come home late at night.'
- Have (nhờ ai, thuê ai): 'I had the mechanic repair my car yesterday.'
- Make (khiến, bắt buộc): 'He has been making me go crazy all these days.'
- Help (giúp đỡ): 'Nobody helps the girl collect her books.'

**3. Theo sau nhóm động từ tri giác (See, Hear, Feel, Watch, Notice) để chỉ toàn bộ quá trình/hành động đã hoàn tất:**
- See: 'When I arrived at the restaurant, I saw her get off John’s car with a bunch of flowers in hands.'
- Hear: 'Jenny heard me talk with my boyfriend on phone.'
- Feel: 'We felt the ground give way under our feet.'
- Watch: 'They watched the bus disappear into the distance.'
- Notice: 'I noticed them come in.'

> **LƯU Ý ĐẶC BIỆT:**

> - Khi chuyển sang câu bị động, các động từ trên chuyển sang dùng TO VERB. Ví dụ: 'She was seen to get off the bus.' / 'We were made to work so hard by the boss.'

> - Sau HELP có thể dùng cả động từ nguyên mẫu có TO hoặc không TO đều được. Ví dụ: 'He helped me do my assignment' hoặc 'He helped me to do my assignment'.

exerciseSets.title: Động từ nguyên mẫu 1 (Thi online - 30 câu)

exercises.question: We decided ________ a new car.
They've got some work ________.
He'd like ________ an aeroplane.
Do you know what ________ if there's a fire in the shop?
My parents wanted me __________ home at 11 o'clock.
I'm hoping __________ Lisa.
He agreed __________ a new car.
The question is easy __________.
The man asked me how __________ to the airport.
We decided __________ through the forest.
The teacher expected Sarah __________ hard.
I learned _________ the bike at the age of 5.
He urged us _________ faster than he does.
You won’t forget _________ milk on your way home, will you?
Please allow me ____________ your Facebook page.
My wife always volunteers ___________ cakes PTA meetings.
Debbie plans _______ abroad next year.
I agreed _________ Jack wash his car.
He asked __________ to the store manager.
Where did you learn _______Spanish? Was it in Spain or in Latin America?
Mandy has promised _________ care of our dog while we are on vacation.
Mr. Edwards chose ______ the management position in Chicago rather than the position in Miami.
I hope _______ from college next June.
Frank offered ______ us paint the house.
Sandra decided ______ economics in London.
Mrs. Naidoo appears ________ the most qualified person for the job.
My mother told me _________ to anyone about it.
We do not want _________ to that restaurant because it’s dirty.
I am prepared _________ here all night if necessary.
You are expected _________ the safety regulation of the college.

exerciseSets.title: Động từ nguyên mẫu 2 (Thi online - 30 câu)

exercises.question: She waited _________ what would happen next.
We fully intend _________ you for all the work you have done for us.
You seem _________ a little distracted. Is everything alright?
She refused _________ that she had made a mistake.
Margaret just happened _________ the lost car keys while she was looking for something else.
Jackie tends _________ late on Mondays, but our boss doesn't seem to care about that very much
The winner of the local competition gets _________ in a national competition in Washington D.C.
Debbie failed _________ her credit card lying on the ground.
The politician swore _________ the people honestly and with pride, but the scandal revealed that the promise was little more than a lie.
The medical team deserves _________ the award for their volunteer work in subSaharan Africa.
She promised _________ to the doctor as soon as she returned home.
Franne encouraged me _________ for the job.
She wants _________ more.
She neglected _________ all the facts.
The food caused her _________ sick.
We expect _________ soon.
Sam chose _________ the meeting.
I tried _________ the picture, but it didn't work.
Laurelle reminded me _________ the door.
I would like _________ the train.
Everybody arranged _________ at the train station 30 minutes before the train departed.
Do you care _________ us later for dinner? We are meeting at Tony's Italian Restaurant downtown.
We waited _________ what would happen next, but nothing happened.
Julius vowed _________ to his home country once again to see the village where he and his family had lived before the war.
Dina yearns _________ to far off, exotic destinations.
They expected _________ much earlier, but their plane was delayed in Paris.
You were fortunate _________ tickets for the concert. I heard they had already sold out!
Bill agreed _________ us at the restaurant at 8:30, but he never showed up.
Dana hopes _________ enough money to travel around Europe for three months. It's her dream.
Constance plans _________ part in the marathon next spring.

exerciseSets.title: Động từ nguyên mẫu 3 (Thi online - 30 câu)

exercises.question: She warned me ________ the wire.
I regret ________ you that your application has been refused.
Our teacher has promised ________ us ________ for the exams.
Can you manage (finish) ________ (write) ________ these reports by yourself?
I used ________ a lot but I haven't had a chance ________ any since ________ here. ~I ride sometimes. Would you like ________ with me next time?

options.text: to ride/ to do/ to come/ to come
to ride/ to do/ coming/ coming
to riding/ to do/ coming/ to come
to ride/ doing/ coming/ to come

exercises.question: Did you remember ________ the door? ~No, I didn't. I'd better ________ back and ________ it now.
She told me _________ through her correspondence and _________ out any letters that you had written her. I didn't like _________ through someone else's letters but I had _________ as she said.

options.text: to look/ take/ looking/ to do
to look/ to take/ looking/ do
look/ take/ to look/ to do

exercises.question: He decided _________ broken glass on top of his wall _________ boys from _________ over it.

options.text: to put/ to prevent/ to climb

exercises.question: You still have a lot _________.
He made me _________ his instructions _________ sure that I understood what I was doing after he had gone.
You don't need _________ his permission every time you want _________ the room.
He didn't like _________ the children alone in the house but he had no alternative as he had _________ out to work
I asked him ________ early.
He offered _________ me the money. I didn't like _________ it but I had no alternative
Did you remember _________ seats for the theatre tomorrow? ~Yes, I have the tickets here. Would you like _________ them? I am inclined _________ theatre tickets

options.text: to book/ to keep/ to lose

exercises.question: I didn't know how _________ to your house so I stopped _________ the way
Did you advise him _________ to the police? ~No, I didn't like _________ any advice on such a difficult matter.
He wanted _________ my chameleon on a tartan rug and _________ it _________ colour
I caught him _________ over my wall. I asked him _________ but he refused _________ anything, so in the end I had _________ him _________.

options.text: to climb/ to explain/ to say/ to let/ to go
climbing/ to explain/ to say/ to let/ go
climb/ to explain/ to say/ to let/ go
climb/ explaining/ saying/ to let/ to go

exercises.question: Our teacher won't allow _________ dictionaries during the test.
We advised _________ a taxi instead of walking to the restaurant.
She prefers _________ dinner because she doesn't like _________.
Sarah urged _________ in the next election.
He needs _________ a visa extension immediately. The authorities won't permit _________ in the country without a visa.
I demand _________ to the manager of the hotel immediately.
She claims _________ to George Washington, but I don't believe her.
She refused _________ to me after our fight.
Don't hesitate _________ for help if you don't understand the directions.
She managed _________ with them, even though she didn't speak their language.
She pretended _________ a student in order to get a student discount.
